standard.title: Calcak – Free Online Calculator
standard.description: Free standard calculator for everyday arithmetic. Fast, accurate, no sign-up required.
standard.body: Our free standard calculator handles everyday arithmetic — addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division — with instant results and calculation history.

mortgage.title: Mortgage Calculator 2025 – Monthly Payment Estimator | Calcak
mortgage.description: Calculate your monthly mortgage payment, total interest, and amortization. Free, fast, accurate.
mortgage.body: Estimate your monthly mortgage payment based on loan amount, interest rate, and term. Includes principal, interest, and optional PMI.

bmi.title: BMI Calculator – Body Mass Index for Adults | Calcak
bmi.description: Calculate your BMI instantly. Supports both imperial (lbs/in) and metric (kg/cm) units.
bmi.body: Body Mass Index (BMI) is a screening tool used to assess weight relative to height. Enter your height and weight to get your BMI and category.

tip.title: Tip Calculator – Split the Bill Instantly | Calcak
tip.description: Calculate tip amount and split the bill between any number of people. Free and instant.
tip.body: Enter your bill total, choose a tip percentage, and split evenly among your group. The standard US tip is 18–20%.

percentage.title: Percentage Calculator – 3 Modes | Calcak
percentage.description: Calculate percentages three ways: X% of Y, X is what % of Y, and % change from X to Y.
percentage.body: Three calculation modes cover the most common percentage questions. Results update instantly.

tax.title: Income Tax Calculator 2025 – Federal Estimate | Calcak
tax.description: Estimate your 2025 federal income tax using current US tax brackets. Fast and free.
tax.body: Estimates federal income tax using 2025 IRS tax brackets. Does not include state taxes, deductions, or credits beyond the standard deduction.

loan.title: Loan Calculator – Monthly Payment & Total Interest | Calcak
loan.description: Calculate monthly loan payments and total interest for any loan amount, rate, and term.
loan.body: Works for personal loans, auto loans, and student loans. Enter the principal, annual interest rate, and term to see your monthly payment.

age.title: Age Calculator – Exact Age in Years, Months & Days | Calcak
age.description: Calculate your exact age from your date of birth. Shows years, months, days, and next birthday.
age.body: Enter your date of birth to see your exact age in years, months, and days, plus how many days until your next birthday.

tax.title: Tax Calculator 2025 – File Before April 15 | Calcak
tax.description: Tax season is here! Estimate your 2025 federal income tax before the April 15 deadline. Free and instant.
tax.body: Tax season runs January through April 15. Use our free federal tax estimator to plan your filing, check your refund, and avoid surprises at the deadline.

mortgage.title: Mortgage Interest Deduction Calculator 2025 | Calcak
mortgage.description: Calculate your mortgage payment and interest deduction for tax season 2025. Free and accurate.

tip.title: Thanksgiving Tip Calculator – Split the Holiday Bill | Calcak
tip.description: Splitting the Thanksgiving restaurant bill? Calculate tips and divide evenly with our free tip calculator.
tip.body: Dining out this Thanksgiving? Enter your bill, choose a tip percentage, and split the total among your group instantly.

loan.title: New Year Loan Calculator 2025 – Plan Your Finances | Calcak
loan.description: Start 2025 right. Calculate loan payments and plan your debt payoff strategy with our free loan calculator.

loan.title: Student Loan Calculator – Back to School 2025 | Calcak
loan.description: Heading back to school? Calculate your student loan payments and total interest. Free and instant.
loan.body: Planning for college costs? Enter your loan amount, interest rate, and term to see your monthly payment and total interest over the life of the loan.

percentage.title: Back to School Discount Calculator 2025 | Calcak
percentage.description: Calculate back-to-school discounts and savings instantly with our free percentage calculator.
